logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Checking inventory | SKU: " ++ (vars.orderSku default "unknown") ++ " | CorrelationId: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Inventory Check

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory check response | Available: " ++ (payload.data.available default 0 as String) ++ " | InStock: " ++ (payload.data.inStock default false as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Inventory Response

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory check failed | SKU: " ++ (vars.orderSku default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Check Error

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Reserving inventory | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | SKU: " ++ (vars.orderSku default "unknown") ++ " | Qty: " ++ (vars.orderQuantity default 0 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Reserve Request

http:request.doc:name: POST Reserve Inventory
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, sku: vars.orderSku, quantity: vars.orderQuantity, customerId: vars.customerId }]

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory reserved | ReservationId: " ++ (payload.data.reservationId default "unknown") ++ " | Value: $" ++ (payload.data.totalValue default "0" as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Reserve Response

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory reservation failed | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Reserve Error

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Releasing inventory reservation | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | ReservationId: " ++ (vars.erpReservationId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Release Request

http:request.doc:name: POST Release Inventory
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, sku: vars.orderSku, quantity: vars.orderQuantity, reservationId: vars.erpReservationId }]

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory released | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Status: SAGA_COMPENSATED"]
logger.doc:name: Log Release Response

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Inventory release failed — manual intervention may be required | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Release Error

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Triggering fulfillment | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Fulfillment Request

http:request.doc:name: POST Trigger Fulfillment
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, sku: vars.orderSku, quantity: vars.orderQuantity, customerId: vars.customerId, shippingAddress: vars.shippingAddress default null }]

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Fulfillment triggered | FulfillmentId: " ++ (payload.data.fulfillmentId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Fulfillment Response

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Fulfillment trigger failed | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Fulfillment Error

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Fetching fulfillment status | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Status Request

logger.message: #["[ERP SYSTEM API] Fulfillment status unavailable | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Status Error

set-payload.value: #[{ data: { status: "UNKNOWN", message: "ERP status temporarily unavailable" } }]
set-payload.doc:name: Default Status Response
